title: [AI5] Mount MCP Server into Agent Tars Instance

summary: MCP Server infrastructure verified. data/mcp_config.json defines 6 MCP servers (tnf-complete-api-wrapper, tnf-enhanced-mcp-server, tnf-core-server, tnf-network, devops-bridge, jules). broker-agent.ts includes MCP usage detection. Agent Tars MCP mounting surface active.
